title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Shaadi.com Global Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Shaadi.com Global Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shaadi.com Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Vadodara-based team.

About Shaadi.com Global Group:
Shaadi.com Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shaadi.com Global Group!
